inputs.label: Reference Pressure (P₀)
inputs.businessContext: Standard sea level pressure (101325 Pa) used for calibration. Adjustable for non-standard conditions.

inputs.label: Air Density (ρ₀)
inputs.businessContext: Sea level standard air density (1.225 kg/m³). Adjustable for calibration.

inputs.label: Specific Heat Ratio (γ)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of specific heats for air (1.4 standard).

formulas.CAS_mps: Math.sqrt( (2 * gamma / (gamma - 1)) * (referencePressure / airDensity) * ( Math.pow( (Math.max(totalPressure - staticPressure, 0) / referencePressure + 1), ((gamma - 1) / gamma) ) - 1 ) )
formulas.CAS_kts: Math.sqrt( (2 * gamma / (gamma - 1)) * (referencePressure / airDensity) * ( Math.pow( (Math.max(totalPressure - staticPressure, 0) / referencePressure + 1), ((gamma - 1) / gamma) ) - 1 ) ) * 1.94384
formulas.CAS_kmh: Math.sqrt( (2 * gamma / (gamma - 1)) * (referencePressure / airDensity) * ( Math.pow( (Math.max(totalPressure - staticPressure, 0) / referencePressure + 1), ((gamma - 1) / gamma) ) - 1 ) ) * 3.6
